# UC-14.10.1 · Aranet CO2 Above OSHA/ASHRAE Indoor Air Thresholds

## Description

CO2 buildup signals poor ventilation and affects cognition; extreme levels create safety risk in enclosed spaces.

## Value

Protects workers under occupational health expectations and documents responses for audits.

## Implementation

(1) Extract `co2_ppm`. (2) Set warning 1000 ppm and danger 5000 ppm to policy. (3) Page facilities on danger. (4) Trend HVAC corrections.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-4h
| eval co2=tonumber(coalesce(co2_ppm, co2, ""))
| eval band=case(co2>=5000,"danger", co2>=1000,"warning", 1=1,"ok")
| where band!="ok"
| stats latest(co2) as co2_ppm latest(band) as band values(location) as sites by sensor_id
```

## Visualization

Single value in-warning; table by sensor; heatmap by floor.

## References

- [Aranet — environmental monitoring](https://aranet.com/)
- [ASHRAE — IAQ](https://www.ashrae.org/)
- [OSHA indoor air](https://www.osha.gov/indoor-air-quality)
